name: MatPES
curator: Materials Virtual Lab / Materials Project (Kaplan, Ko, Liu, Qi, Deng, Riebesell, Ceder, Persson, Ong)
size: ~434k PBE single-point structures (v2025.1; v2025.2 adds Bader/DDEC6 charges and de-duplication), DIRECT-sampled from 300K MD seeded by Materials Project entries
dftLevel: PBE (r2SCAN companion release); VASP with MatPESStaticSet
primaryPaper: Kaplan et al., A Foundational Potential Energy Surface Dataset for Materials, arXiv:2503.04070 (2025).
howToGet: Available on Hugging Face Datasets at materialyze/matpes, with bulk download also via MPContribs and tooling at matpes.ai. MatGL hosts MatPES-trained foundation potentials (M3GNet, CHGNet, TensorNet).
